title: マヤちんのレース講座☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After having watched a scrimmage together,
Mayano Top Gun and I head back home, when...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Maya! Did you come to the race to support
me?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yep! Nice hustle out there, Urara. ☆

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Today was super fun! I may have come in dead
last, but I still got to run a lot. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Cool! You're so positive! I always sulk when I
lose! ☆

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I think racing is fun no matter what! I just love
running!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: But... winning is really hard! How do you do it?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Me?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You're always super fast—like a jet!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I think if I were as fast as you, I'd totally win too!
choice_data_list: How about you join us for practice?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Good idea! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If you practice with me, I'm sure you'll win next
time!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to Maya & Trainer's Special Lecture
Series! ☆ You'll be our one and only student for
today! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yep, yep! Urara, reporting for duty!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Not a second to waste! Let's get started! First, a
question for Trainer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What does Urara need to win?
choice_data_list: Stamina to keep her from wearing herself out!
A trick for overtaking her rivals!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's right! ☆ I'd expect nothing less of my
trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ahem! Now then, Haru Urara!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
To put it simply... you totally ran out of fuel
mid-flight in your last race!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I totally did! It was so fun, but I was super beat!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If you can improve your stamina, you should be
able to run without tiring yourself out. ☆

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Makes sense! You're so smart, Maya! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Cool your jets for a sec! I'm your teacher today,
so call me Miss Maya!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yes, Miss Maya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so Haru Urara's training with Miss Mayano Top Gun begins.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! ☆ Are you reading my mind?! I was
thinking the same thing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, Urara, how do you usually run?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Usually? I just run with everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I see... Is there anything you're having
trouble with?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Um, I just can't seem to get ahead! I always think
that I'll smack into someone and start panicking!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oho! I see!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Let's try this. Next time you run, only look
straight ahead.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Keep gazing ahead, and then when no one's in
front of you...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That's when you blast forward! ☆

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Got it! I'll give it a try! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, you'll never guess what! I passed someone!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yay, you did it! You passed someo—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Someone? Just one person?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! I'll just keep passing people one by one
until I get first! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Nice! Keep that up and you'll definitely make it to
first one day!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems helping out Haru Urara has been a
positive experience for Mayano Top Gun.
